What We Offer

Security Solutions for Every Environment

Static Guard Services

Dedicated on-site guards for access control, perimeter monitoring, and deterrence.

Mobile Patrol

Corporate Security

Event Security

Crowd management, access control, and on-site coordination for events of any scale.

Our Story

Built on Integrity.
Driven by Results.

The Sky Power Group Inc. was founded by Michael E. Ndinwa in 2020 under Sky Power Inc., and incorporated as The Sky Power Group Inc. on August 19, 2022. Built on a simple principle: security personnel should be as professional, accountable, and dependable as the clients they protect — that principle guides every contract we sign and every officer we deploy.

We are an independently owned, full-service private security firm operating across commercial, residential, corporate, and government environments. Our founder brings hands-on experience from major national firms including Protos Security Services, Allied Universal, Securitas, Guard One, and NESCTC — giving every client enterprise-level operational standards.

Work With Us
10+
Years
Our Core Values
01

Integrity

Every officer is held to the highest standards of conduct. We don't compromise on ethics — ever.

02

Reliability

No-call, no-show is not in our vocabulary. Our clients count on us and we show up — every time.

03

Professionalism

Uniformed, trained, and equipped. Our personnel represent your brand as much as ours.

04

Accountability

GPS-tracked shifts, digital incident reports, and transparent billing. You always know what's happening.

05

Responsiveness

Our operations center runs 24/7. Incidents are escalated and resolved without delay.

06

Partnership

We treat every contract as a long-term relationship — not a transaction.

Leadership

Experienced. Trusted. Ready.

Past Performance

Proven at the Enterprise Level

Before founding The Sky Power Group Inc., President Michael E. Ndinwa built his expertise working within and alongside the largest security firms in the country — bringing enterprise-level standards to every client we serve.

Protos Security Services

Security guard staffing & patrol — multiple locations, 2017 to present

Allied Universal

Unarmed security officer placement — assigned sites

Securitas

Guard staffing & patrol support — various locations

Guard One

Security personnel services — multiple assignments

NESCTC

Security staffing — various locations and contracts

KinderCare

Site security and personnel deployment

Hilton Hotels

Hospitality security services — on-site personnel deployment

What We Do

Comprehensive Security
for Every Situation.

From a single-location retail store to a multi-site corporate campus, we provide the personnel, training, and management infrastructure to keep your people and property safe.

🛡

Static Guard Services

Dedicated uniformed officers stationed at your location for access control, deterrence, and monitoring. Shift lengths and break schedules tailored to your contract.

Most Requested
🚗

Mobile Patrol

Regular and randomized patrol circuits across large properties, parking structures, and multi-building campuses. GPS-verified with full shift logs.

High Visibility
🏢

Corporate & Executive Security

Discreet, professional security for corporate environments. Executive protection, lobby management, and internal threat assessment services available.

Premium Tier
🎤

Event Security

Experienced event officers for concerts, conferences, sporting events, private gatherings, and large public venues. Pre-event planning included.

Scalable
🏘

Residential & HOA Security

Courteous, uniformed guards for gated communities, apartment complexes, and residential properties. Visitor management and patrol included.

Community Focused
⚡

Emergency Response & Dispatch

Rapid-response deployment for urgent security needs. Direct coordination with local law enforcement and management escalation protocols in place.

24/7 Available
📦

Logistics & Warehouse Security

Asset protection for distribution centers, loading docks, and storage facilities. Loss prevention and inventory security specialists available.

Asset Protection
🏥

Healthcare Facility Security

Sensitive, HIPAA-aware security personnel trained for hospital environments. De-escalation and patient management certified officers.

Specialized
Why Choose Us

What Sets Sky Power Apart

GPS-Verified Accountability

Every clock-in and clock-out is geotagged. You know exactly where your guard is and when.

Real-Time Incident Reports

Written and audio incident reports delivered to your operations team the moment they're filed.

Site-Specific Protocols

Break rules, patrol schedules, and escalation procedures are customized per location.

Automatic Weekly Invoicing

Clean, itemized invoices generated at the end of every week — no chasing, no delays.

Pre-Shift Check-In Required

All guards check in 2 hours before shift start. No-call, no-show situations are eliminated by design.

Get Started

Let's Discuss Your Security Needs

Request a no-obligation quote and we'll customize a plan for your location.

Join Our Team

Build a Career Worth Protecting.

The Sky Power Group Inc. is always looking for disciplined, professional individuals ready to serve with integrity. We invest in our people — from training to advancement.

W2 & 1099
Employment Options
Full & Part
Time Positions
Paid Training
Provided
Why Sky Power

What We Offer Our People

01

Competitive Pay

W2 and 1099 pay structures. Rates commensurate with experience, certification, and site assignment.

02

Flexible Scheduling

Day, evening, overnight, and weekend shifts available across multiple locations to fit your life.

03

Paid Training

All new officers complete our structured onboarding and training program before their first shift — on our time.

04

Career Growth

We promote from within. Officers move into supervisor, operations, and management roles as they grow.

05

Uniform Provided

Professional uniforms supplied. You show up ready — we handle the rest.

06

Supportive Team

24/7 operations support means you're never out there alone. Management is always reachable.

Open Positions

Current Openings

Security Guard — Day Shift
Multiple Locations  ·  Full-Time  ·  W2
Now Hiring +
Responsibilities
  • Monitor and patrol assigned areas
  • Control access to client locations
  • Write and submit incident reports
  • Respond to emergencies and alerts
  • Maintain professional appearance and conduct
  • Clock in/out via GPS-verified mobile system
Requirements
  • Valid security guard license (or willing to obtain)
  • Clean background check
  • Reliable transportation
  • Strong communication skills
  • Professional demeanor
  • Smartphone required for check-in system
Security Guard — Night Shift
Multiple Locations  ·  Full-Time  ·  W2 or 1099
Now Hiring +
Responsibilities
  • Overnight monitoring and patrol
  • Access and perimeter control
  • Incident documentation and reporting
  • Coordinate with day shift on handoff
  • Alert management of any issues immediately
Requirements
  • Security license or willingness to obtain
  • Ability to work overnight hours
  • Dependable and punctual
  • Background check required
  • Smartphone for GPS check-in
Mobile Patrol Officer
Metro Area  ·  Full-Time  ·  W2
Now Hiring +
Responsibilities
  • Conduct scheduled and random patrol routes
  • Cover multiple client sites per shift
  • GPS-log each checkpoint visit
  • Respond to alarms and disturbances
  • Submit end-of-shift digital reports
Requirements
  • Valid driver's license — clean record
  • Security license required
  • Own reliable vehicle preferred
  • Strong situational awareness
  • Background check required
Shift Supervisor
Various Locations  ·  Full-Time  ·  W2
Now Hiring +
Responsibilities
  • Oversee a team of security officers per shift
  • Conduct briefings and post assignments
  • Review and approve incident reports
  • Serve as point of contact for client on-site
  • Escalate issues to operations management
  • Ensure compliance with site-specific protocols
Requirements
  • 2+ years security experience
  • Prior supervisory or leadership role preferred
  • Active security license
  • Excellent communication skills
  • Background check required
Event Security Specialist
Various Venues  ·  Part-Time / As Needed  ·  1099
Now Hiring +
Responsibilities
  • Crowd management at events of all sizes
  • Access control and ticket verification support
  • De-escalate situations professionally
  • Coordinate with event staff and local law enforcement
  • Complete post-event incident reports
Requirements
  • Security license preferred
  • Event or crowd management experience a plus
  • Calm under pressure
  • Available weekends and evenings
  • Background check required
